title: Tamarind Fritters
description: Crispy and flavorful tamarind fritters with a hint of herbal spice. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, tamarind paste, herbal spice blend, and salt.
Gradually add in water and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
Sprinkle crispy fried onions on top of the fritters, if using.
